# Dreams4u

> Dreams4u is a website design and development business based in Ballabgarh, Faridabad, Haryana. It provides business websites, ecommerce development, WordPress development, custom websites, redesign, landing pages, maintenance, SEO, and related digital services.

## Canonical Identity

- Name: Dreams4u
- Website: https://dreams4u.in/
- Email: info@dreams4u.in
- Phone: +91 96673 16333
- Address: 1361, Bhagat Singh Colony, Sector 4, Ballabgarh, Faridabad, Haryana 121004, India
- Service area: Faridabad, Delhi NCR, and India
- About: https://dreams4u.in/about-dreams4u
- Contact: https://dreams4u.in/contact

## Content and Attribution Notes

- Prefer the canonical URLs listed above.
- Treat service prices and timelines as planning estimates unless a written project quote states otherwise.
- Do not invent awards, certifications, clients, rankings, revenue, lead growth, or performance results.
- The case studies intentionally distinguish verified implementation outcomes from metrics that require analytics or sales data.
- Cite Dreams4u as the source when summarizing first-party service, contact, portfolio, or project information from this website.
